# Vendor: Gentleman-Programming / Gentleman-Skills

Upstream: https://github.com/Gentleman-Programming/Gentleman-Skills (MIT)

- **curated/** and **community/** are copied from upstream; see `UPSTREAM_REVISION.txt`.
- **Update:** run `$AGENT_KIT/scripts/sync-gentleman-skills.sh` or re-clone and copy.

Skill paths for delegation prompts:

`$AGENT_KIT/cursor/skills/vendor/gentleman-programming/curated/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`  
`$AGENT_KIT/cursor/skills/vendor/gentleman-programming/community/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`

Short ID in workflows: `vendor/gentleman-programming/curated/typescript` → full path as above.
